Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Apex Lawn Care to get the job done right.

“After years of watching water pool in my Five Points backyard, Apex Lawn Care's aeration made an immediate difference. They explained how the red clay was preventing drainage and even showed me the soil plugs. My lawn finally absorbs rain instead of shedding it onto the sidewalk.”

Marcus T. Core Aeration
Mar 14, 2025

“The fescue blend they used in our North Hills yard survived last July's heatwave when every other lawn on the street went brown. I appreciate how they matched the new grass to our existing turf - you can't tell where they reseeded except it's noticeably thicker.”

Nina R. Drought-Resistant Overseeding
Jan 22, 2025

“When an oak limb crushed our garden in Brier Creek, their team arrived within hours. They carefully removed debris without damaging our perennials, then leveled the ruts with soil that matched our existing grade. The repair was so seamless our neighbors didn't realize we'd had damage.”

David and Sarah K. Storm Recovery
Nov 5, 2024

“As NC State employees, we're conscious of runoff into Lake Raleigh. Their organic program has given us the greenest lawn on the block without the guilt. The soil test revealed our phosphorus levels were high, so they customized a blend that's helping balance our soil naturally.”

Elena P. Organic Fertilization
Sep 30, 2024

“They caught a cracked backflow preventer during winterization that would've flooded our Morrisville foundation come spring. The technician took time to show me the issue and explain how the winter freeze-thaw cycles cause metal fatigue. Preventative maintenance pays off.”

James L. Irrigation Winterization
Oct 18, 2024

“From spring aeration through fall leaf cleanup, Apex has kept our historic ITB lawn looking pristine. They understand how shade from our 1950s oaks affects grass growth and adjust their approach accordingly. After bad experiences with national chains, we value their local expertise.”

The Henderson Family Full-Season Lawn Care
Feb 3, 2025
Apex Lawn Care

Trusted lawn care professionals serving Raleigh, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-law-r92
